set.from: [ adkAgentConfigId : cfg.adkAgentConfigId, agentName : cfg.agentName, modelName : cfg.modelName, llmProvider : cfg.llmProvider ?: 'gemini', instruction : cfg.instruction, description : cfg.description, enabled : cfg.enabled == 'Y', scheduleExpression: cfg.scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled : cfg.scheduleEnabled == 'Y', schedulePrompt : cfg.schedulePrompt, scheduleChatRoomId: cfg.scheduleChatRoomId, toolMode : cfg.toolMode ?: 'readOnly', serviceAllowlist : cfg.serviceAllowlist, writePolicy : cfg.writePolicy ?: 'approve', approvalChatRoomId: cfg.approvalChatRoomId, agentPartyId : cfg.agentPartyId, agentRole : cfg.agentRole ?: 'specialist', orchestrationType : cfg.orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations : cfg.loopMaxIterations, ]

service-call.name: AdkServices.update#AgentConfig
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, agentName: agentName, modelName: modelName, apiKey: apiKey, llmProvider: llmProvider, instruction: instruction, description: description, scheduleExpression: scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled: scheduleEnabled ? 'Y' : 'N', schedulePrompt: schedulePrompt, scheduleChatRoomId: scheduleChatRoomId, toolMode: toolMode, serviceAllowlist: serviceAllowlist, writePolicy: writePolicy, approvalChatRoomId: approvalChatRoomId, websiteChat: websiteChat ? 'Y' : 'N', agentRole: agentRole, orchestrationType: orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations: loopMaxIterations]

set.from: [ adkAgentConfigId : cfg.adkAgentConfigId, agentName : cfg.agentName, modelName : cfg.modelName, llmProvider : cfg.llmProvider ?: 'gemini', instruction : cfg.instruction, description : cfg.description, enabled : cfg.enabled == 'Y', scheduleExpression: cfg.scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled : cfg.scheduleEnabled == 'Y', schedulePrompt : cfg.schedulePrompt, scheduleChatRoomId: cfg.scheduleChatRoomId, toolMode : cfg.toolMode ?: 'readOnly', serviceAllowlist : cfg.serviceAllowlist, writePolicy : cfg.writePolicy ?: 'approve', approvalChatRoomId: cfg.approvalChatRoomId, agentPartyId : cfg.agentPartyId, websiteChat : cfg.websiteChat == 'Y', agentRole : cfg.agentRole ?: 'specialist', orchestrationType : cfg.orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations : cfg.loopMaxIterations, ]

service-call.name: AdkServices.update#AgentConfig
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, adkAgentConfigId: adkAgentConfigId, agentName: agentName ?: existing?.agentName, modelName: modelName ?: existing?.modelName, apiKey: apiKey, llmProvider: llmProvider, instruction: instruction, description: description, scheduleExpression: scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled: scheduleEnabled ? 'Y' : 'N', schedulePrompt: schedulePrompt, scheduleChatRoomId: scheduleChatRoomId, toolMode: toolMode, serviceAllowlist: serviceAllowlist, writePolicy: writePolicy, approvalChatRoomId: approvalChatRoomId, websiteChat: websiteChat ? 'Y' : 'N', agentRole: agentRole, orchestrationType: orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations: loopMaxIterations]

set.from: [ adkAgentConfigId : cfg.adkAgentConfigId, agentName : cfg.agentName, modelName : cfg.modelName, llmProvider : cfg.llmProvider ?: 'gemini', instruction : cfg.instruction, description : cfg.description, enabled : cfg.enabled == 'Y', scheduleExpression: cfg.scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled : cfg.scheduleEnabled == 'Y', schedulePrompt : cfg.schedulePrompt, scheduleChatRoomId: cfg.scheduleChatRoomId, toolMode : cfg.toolMode ?: 'readOnly', serviceAllowlist : cfg.serviceAllowlist, writePolicy : cfg.writePolicy ?: 'approve', approvalChatRoomId: cfg.approvalChatRoomId, agentPartyId : cfg.agentPartyId, websiteChat : cfg.websiteChat == 'Y', agentRole : cfg.agentRole ?: 'specialist', orchestrationType : cfg.orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations : cfg.loopMaxIterations, ]

iterate.script: members.add([ adkAgentTeamMemberId: r.adkAgentTeamMemberId, coordinatorConfigId: r.coordinatorConfigId, memberConfigId: r.memberConfigId, memberName: mc?.agentName, memberDescription: mc?.description, sequenceNum: r.sequenceNum, delegationMode: r.delegationMode ?: 'tool', enabled: r.enabled == 'Y' ])

return.message: Coordinator and member must both belong to your company.
An agent cannot be its own team member.

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkAgentTeamMember
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, coordinatorConfigId: coordinatorConfigId, memberConfigId: memberConfigId, sequenceNum: sequenceNum, delegationMode: delegationMode ?: 'tool', enabled: 'Y']

iterate.script: adkMcpServers.add([ adkMcpServerId: r.adkMcpServerId, serverName: r.serverName, url: r.url, transport: r.transport ?: 'sse', enabled: r.enabled == 'Y' ])

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkMcpServer
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, serverName: serverName, url: url, transport: transport ?: 'sse', headersJson: headersJson, enabled: enabled ? 'Y' : 'N']

set.from: [ adkMcpServerId: adkMcpServerId, serverName: serverName, url: url, transport: transport ?: 'sse', enabled: enabled ]

return.message: MCP server not found for your company.

set.from: [ adkMcpServerId: srv.adkMcpServerId, serverName: srv.serverName, url: srv.url, transport: srv.transport ?: 'sse', enabled: srv.enabled == 'Y' ]

iterate.script: servers.add([ adkAgentMcpServerId: r.adkAgentMcpServerId, configId: r.configId, adkMcpServerId: r.adkMcpServerId, serverName: srv?.serverName, url: srv?.url, transport: srv?.transport ?: 'sse', sequenceNum: r.sequenceNum, enabled: r.enabled == 'Y' ])

return.message: Agent and MCP server must both belong to your company.

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkAgentMcpServer
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, configId: configId, adkMcpServerId: adkMcpServerId, sequenceNum: sequenceNum, enabled: 'Y']

set.from: [ jobName : jn, agentName : agentName, configId : configId, cronExpression: job.cronExpression, paused : job.paused == 'Y', isLocked : isLocked, lockRunId : lock?.jobRunId, lastRunTime : lock?.lastRunTime?.toString(), lockAgeMin : lockAgeMin, latestStatus : latestStatus, latestStart : latestRun?.startTime?.toString(), latestEnd : latestRun?.endTime?.toString(), latestErrors : latestRun?.errors, ]

service.description: Clear a stale scheduler lock on an ADK job.
Pause or resume a scheduled ADK job.

iterate.script: adkKnowledgeDocs.add([ adkKnowledgeDocId: d.adkKnowledgeDocId, title: d.title, sourceType: d.sourceType, mimeType: d.mimeType, chunkCount: chs.size(), createdDate: d.createdDate ])

service-call.name: AdkKnowledgeServices.ingest#AdkKnowledge
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, title: title, text: text, sourceType: sourceType, createdByUserId: ec.user.userId]

service-call.name: AdkKnowledgeServices.update#AdkKnowledge
service-call.in-map: [adkKnowledgeDocId: adkKnowledgeDocId, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, title: title, text: text]

return.message: The GROWERP owner already has the marketing team

service-call.name: AdkServices.update#AgentConfig
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, agentName: tmpl.agentName, modelName: tmpl.modelName, llmProvider: tmpl.llmProvider, instruction: tmpl.instruction, description: tmpl.description, scheduleExpression: tmpl.scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled: cloneScheduleEnabled, schedulePrompt: tmpl.schedulePrompt, toolMode: tmpl.toolMode, serviceAllowlist: tmpl.serviceAllowlist, writePolicy: tmpl.writePolicy, websiteChat: tmpl.websiteChat, agentRole: tmpl.agentRole, orchestrationType: tmpl.orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations: tmpl.loopMaxIterations]
